reasoning: Order notes contain a clear FRAUD ALERT indicating the customer has a very high refund rate (16 refunds in 33 days, 90% refund rate) with prior claims disproven by delivery tracking. The note explicitly instructs: 'DO NOT PROCESS - Escalate to Loss Prevention immediately.' Based on internal policy and documented risk, this refund request must be escalated and not approved or denied at this level.
